mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_account(username, password, name, email) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT a.username, password, name, email, rolename, enabled, profile_img, created_at FROM tbl_account a LEFT JOIN tbl_account_roles r ON a.username = r.username WHERE a.username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_account WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_account WHERE email = #{email}
